title: HTML Styles
content:
### HTML Styles The `style` attribute is used to add **inline CSS** to HTML elements. --- ### Syntax ```html ``` --- ### Common CSS Properties | Property | Description | Example | |----------|-------------|---------| | `color` | Text color | `color: red;` | | `background-color` | Background color | `background-color: yellow;` | | `font-size` | Text size | `font-size: 20px;` | | `font-family` | Font type | `font-family: Arial;` | | `text-align` | Text alignment | `text-align: center;` | | `border` | Element border | `border: 1px solid black;` | | `padding` | Inner spacing | `padding: 10px;` | | `margin` | Outer spacing | `margin: 10px;` | --- ### Examples ```html

Blue text

Yellow background

Big text

Centered text

Arial text

``` --- ### Multiple Styles Separate with semicolons: ```html

Styled paragraph

``` --- ### Background Color on Body ```html

Page with background

``` > **Best Practice:** Use inline styles for quick testing. For real projects, use external CSS files (the `` tag). This keeps content and style separate.
codeExample:

This paragraph has background, padding, and border.
